name: PER_CHECKLISTS_B
description: This table records the checklist templates.

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column. Surrogate Key

columns.Name: ACCESS_LEVEL
columns.Comments: ACCESS_LEVEL

columns.Name: SECURITY_ENABLED
columns.Comments: SECURITY_ENABLED

columns.Name: ACCESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: ACCESS_GROUP_ID

columns.Name: LEVEL_CODE
columns.Comments: LEVEL_CODE

columns.Name: LEVEL_VALUE
columns.Comments: LEVEL_VALUE

columns.Name: OBSOLETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: OBSOLETE_FLAG

columns.Name: PROCESSING_MODE
columns.Comments: Identifies if the task need to be processed with SOA/ESS.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for welcome notification.

columns.Name: FCL_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: FCL_TEMPLATE_ID

columns.Name: COMBINED_TASK_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Alert template for combined notification.

columns.Name: BACKGROUND_THUMBNAIL_URL
columns.Comments: BACKGROUND_THUMBNAIL_URL

columns.Name: EVALUATION_MODE
columns.Comments: Evaluation Mode.

columns.Name: BACKGROUND_IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: Background Image URL

columns.Name: CHECKLIST_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Signifies category of the checklist. For example ONBOARD or OFFBOARD.

columns.Name: EVENT_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Action that results in the checklist template getting automatically allocated to the person experiencing the action.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation Code derived from Legal Entity

columns.Name: ACTIVE_INACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_CHECKLIST_STATUS
Values: ORA_DRAFT - Draft
ORA_ACTIVE - Active
ORA_INACTIVE - In active

columns.Name: ALLOW_ALLOCATION_CREATE

columns.Name: ALLOW_ALLOCATION_DELETE

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ELIGIBILITY_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to BEN_ELIGY_PRFL.ELIGY_PRFL_ID (Eligibility Profile for Checklist)

columns.Name: ALLOCATED_ON
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_CHECKLIST_ALCTD_ON
Values: ORA_IMMEDIATE - Immediate
ORA_EVENT_DATE - On or after event date

columns.Name: OFFSET_DAYS
columns.Comments: Offset days for allocation of checklist w.r.t to the event date.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Checklist active from date

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Checklist active up to date.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_ON
columns.Comments:
System Lookup: ORA_CHK_CHECKLIST_CMP_ON
Values: ORA_MAND_COMPLETE- All mandatory tasks are complete.
ORA_MAND_WITH_OFFSET - All mandatory tasks complete with a grace period.
ORA_ALL_COMPLETE - All tasks are complete.

columns.Name: COMPLETION_OFFSET_DAYS
columns.Comments: Offset days for checklist completion w.r.t the last mandatory task completion date

columns.Name: TRIGGER_TYPE
columns.Comments:
Valid values are

ORA_EMPL_ACTION - Employment Action

ORA_CHECKLIST_ACTION - Checklist Action
